title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners List - Complete Coverage
text: The animated feature category included six nominees at the 2026 Golden Globes. The winning film, KPop Demon Hunters, competed against notable animated entries including Arco, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle, Elio, Little Amélie or the Character of Rain, and Zootopia 2. The ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, with comedian Nikki Glaser hosting for a second consecutive year. The animated category represented one of several competitive contests throughout the evening, as the publication noted that international films received significant recognition at this year's proceedings.
